OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: Supported MIME type (JSON for MISP exports).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_FROM_DATE.description: Only import MISP events from this date onwards.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_REPORTS.description: Create a Report entity for each MISP event.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_REPORT_TYPE.description: Report type to use for imported events.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Create Indicator entities from MISP attributes.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: Create Observable entities from MISP attributes.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_CREATE_TAGS_AS_LABELS.description: Convert MISP tags to OpenCTI labels.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_GUESS_THREAT_FROM_TAGS.description: Attempt to identify threats (malware, intrusion sets, etc.) from MISP tags when they are present in OpenCTI.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_AUTHOR_FROM_TAGS.description: Map creator:XX=YY tags to set report author.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_MARKINGS_FROM_TAGS.description: Extract TLP/PAP markings from MISP tags.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_TO_IDS_NO_SCORE.description: Score to assign to indicators/observables when the attribute to_ids is false.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_UNSUPPORTED_OBSE.description: Import unsupported observable types as Text observables.
Use only the value for unsupported observables imported as text.

MISP_IMPORT_FILE_IMPORT_WITH_ATTACHMENTS.description: Import PDF attachments from MISP attributes.
